title: feat: simplify app submission workflow
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Replaces the `TIER-APP*` state machine with four clear `APP-*` labels and an evidence-based human review gate.
- Checks the live app and optional repository through a size-bounded, DNS-pinned fetch path; sanitizes AI comments.
- Freezes publishing to the approval-event issue snapshot, revalidates it, and serializes `APPS.md` auto-merge PRs.
- Makes label changes atomic and publication failures visible, cleanly retryable, and safe from stale branches.
- Updates submission links, Apps routing, migration triggers, catalog sync, KPI pagination, tests, and contributor docs.

Validation: 5 parser/snapshot tests, Python syntax and fetch-safety checks, YAML parsing, Biome, generated catalog check, and KPI production build.

Rollout: add `APP-SUBMISSION` to every historical app issue, including closed/rejected issues, and map open legacy review-state labels after merge.

gist.headline: Apps get a clearer garden gate
gist.blurb: App submissions now travel through four plain `APP-*` labels instead of a small state-machine thicket. Polli has put up a tidy review gate, and the catalog only blooms from the approved snapshot.
gist.summary: Reworked community app submissions around four `APP-*` labels, evidence-based review of live apps and optional repositories, approval-snapshot publishing, and serialized `APPS.md` catalog updates.
gist.impact: Contributors get a clearer submission path, while approved apps are revalidated and published from the reviewed version with visible, safe-to-retry failures.
gist.visual_concept: Depict the old tangled label path replaced by four neat garden signposts labeled `APP-*`, leading to a small approved app greenhouse and a glowing catalog book. Polli, wearing a tiny gardener's hat and carrying a clipboard, inspects an app seedling with the eager CRT Monitor Robot; the scene represents human review, a frozen approved snapshot, and orderly publication.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, a cute pixel bee with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, black oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blush, small smile, light blue translucent wings, and a tiny gardener's hat, holding a clipboard beside four neat garden signposts marked `APP-*`; an eager chunky CRT monitor robot helps guide a code-plant from an approved greenhouse into a glowing `APPS.md` catalog book. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint-lavender-peach gradient background, flowers and vines, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, dark purple (#110518) pixel outlines, nostalgic but beautiful and emotionally warm.
